channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South African nurse's journey to securing nursing job in Saudi Arabia amid challenges
item.description: Ziziphofuze, a South African nurse, shared her detailed experience of applying for a nursing position in Saudi Arabia through TikTok. She partnered with Thymic Connections, a recruitment agency specia...

item.title: Sam Neill Passes Away: Family Shares Heartfelt Memories of the Jurassic Park Icon
item.description: The passing of Sam Neill, the iconic Australian actor best known for his role as Ian Malcolm in the Jurassic Park franchise, has sparked widespread mourning among fans and colleagues. Friends and fami...

item.title: Heat Warnings and Storm Threats Across Multiple Provinces
item.description: Environment Canada has issued widespread weather alerts across five provinces and one territory due to extreme heat, thunderstorms, and tornado risks. Temperatures are expected to reach mid- to high-3...

item.title: Bank of Tanzania Raises Interest Rates, Impacts Investors
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BoT) has increased its Central Bank Rate by 50 basis points to 6.25%, a moderate adjustment aimed at maintaining price stability amid global economic uncertainty. This move, whic...

item.title: Queens Of The Stone Age unveil new single 'Easy Street' with raw, imperfect sound
item.description: Queens Of The Stone Age have released their new single 'Easy Street', a psychedelic track that blends acoustic guitar with synth elements. The song, produced by Josh Homme and Michael Shuman, features...

item.title: Bangkok pub fire kills at least 30 as safety concerns mount
item.description: A devastating fire at a live music pub in Bangkok's Chatuchak area has claimed at least 30 lives, with dozens more in critical condition. Authorities suspect an electrical short circuit in a ceiling a...

item.title: The Evolution of Madras Curry: From Colonial Kitchens to Global Fame
item.description: The article explores the fascinating history of Madras Curry, tracing its origins to the 18th-century colonial kitchens of Madras (now Chennai). It highlights how the dish emerged from the intersectio...

item.title: Toronto mayoral candidate criticizes police official's safety remarks after shooting incident
item.description: The article discusses a mayoral candidate in Toronto, Brad Bradford, who strongly criticized a top police official for labeling the city as 'extremely safe' following a shooting incident at a festival...

item.title: Another attack in Benue community leaves one dead
item.description: A fresh attack hit Ondo community in Ugboju District of Otukpo Local Government Area of Benue State, killing one person and injuring another. Suspected armed attackers stormed the community early Tues...

item.title: South Africa's March and March Movement Intensifies Protests Following Leader's Death
item.description: The March and March movement in South Africa has vowed to escalate its weekly protests following the killing of its Gauteng leader, Andile Mvuyelwa Somgxada, who was shot dead outside his home in Gree...

item.title: Tyrannosaurus rex skeleton auctioned for $50.1 million at Sotheby's
item.description: A rare Tyrannosaurus rex skeleton, believed to be one of the most complete dinosaur fossils ever discovered, was sold at a record-breaking price of $50.1 million during a high-profile auction at Sothe...

item.title: Body camera footage shows Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo identifying himself during a traffic stop before being released without a citation
item.description: Body camera footage obtained by the Las Vegas Review-Journal shows Nevada Governor Joe Lombardo being stopped by a Las Vegas Metropolitan Police sergeant on May 15 for a suspected red-light violation ...

item.title: New Payment System Streamlines Agricultural Transactions to Boost Productivity
item.description: Farmers across Tanzania are set to benefit from a new payment system designed to streamline transactions and improve efficiency in the agricultural sector. This initiative addresses long-standing chal...

item.title: Bea Alonzo and Vincent Co Confirm Marriage in Manila Ceremony
item.description: Filipina actress Bea Alonzo and businessman Vincent Co, son of tycoons Lucio and Susan Co, officially tied the knot in a wedding ceremony officiated by Makati City Mayor Nancy Binay. Their marriage wa...

item.title: Albanese to establish AI office with national framework commitments
item.description: The article discusses the Australian government's plans to announce an Office of AI initiative as part of a national framework. However, the text provided appears to be an error message from News Corp...

item.title: ED Investigates Alleged Municipal Recruitment Scam Involving TMC MLA's Family
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has summoned the wife and two sons of TMC MLA Madan Mitra for questioning in a money laundering probe related to an alleged municipal recruitment scam in West Bengal. ...

item.title: ICE halts traffic stops following fatal shootings by agents
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has suspended most traffic stops following two fatal shootings by agents this week, marking a significant policy shift. The incidents occurred during vehicle ...

item.title: Investigations Into Physiotherapist Mary Habila's Death at Minister David Umahi's Residence Continue
item.description: The death of physiotherapist Mary Habila at the residence of Nigeria's Minister of Works, David Umahi, remains under investigation. Police sources confirmed that investigators are examining the sequen...

item.title: McLaren Circus brings live family entertainment to Durban during the winter school holidays
item.description: McLaren Circus is providing Durban families with a live entertainment option during the winter school holidays by staging performances under its iconic big top near Suncoast Casino until 17 July. The ...

item.title: Federal Govt Forms Economic Advisory Panel to Boost Fiscal Reforms
item.description: The Federal Government has formed a Ministerial Economic Advisory Committee to strengthen economic policymaking and accelerate fiscal reforms. The committee, comprising economists, public finance expe...
